caption: A man with short, dark hair and a light beard is seated in a recording studio, positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. He is wearing large black over-ear headphones and a black zip-up jacket over a grey shirt. The background consists of dark grey, ribbed acoustic foam panels. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, looking slightly to his left with a subtle smile on his face. He appears to be engaged in a conversation, though his lips remain mostly closed or slightly parted in a smile across the frames. The equipment, including the microphone and headphones, remains stationary. The only noticeable change between the frames is a slight shift in the man's facial expression and the position of his head as he maintains his gaze off-camera.
